qtype: simultaneous linear equations, expanding and simplifying
tex:
(a) Expand the brackets and simplify fully.
\newline

\[ 5(x - 3) + 2(3x + 1) \]

(b) Solve the simultaneous equations.
\newline
\\
You must show all your working.
\newline

\begin{align*}
4x - y &= 14 \\
3x + 2y &= 5
\end{align*}
